subject: FYI: removed the 'Also delete model files from disk' checkbox (frontend-only, no backend touch)
body:
Heads-up while you verify the download/install/uninstall refactor.

WHAT I CHANGED (frontend only): js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiModelManager/MpiModelManager.js
  1. Dropped the `checkbox` prop from the Uninstall MpiOkCancel dialog config (was 'Also delete model files from disk', checked:true).
  2. The dialog's on('ok') handler now calls pending.run(true) unconditionally instead of passing checkboxChecked.

WHY: install-state is derived by statting disk (syncModelInstalled -> /comfy/models/check). So 'keep files' (deleteFiles=false) was a no-op UX: files stayed on disk, resync re-flagged the model INSTALLED, card never left the Installed section, no install button. User confirmed this dead state on SDXL. Decision: always delete, remove the toggle from UI.

WHAT I DID NOT TOUCH: routes/downloadManager.js and the whole backend uninstall path are UNCHANGED. The `deleteFiles` request param is still accepted server-side; it now always receives true. All your guards (universal / shared-dep / outside-managed-root / pip) are untouched. The two _showConfirm callbacks (_confirmWholeUninstall ~L479, op-remove ~L552) keep their `async (deleteFiles) =>` signature and still forward the value to downloadService.uninstall(); they just always get true now.

No backend/deleteFiles-wire removal was done on purpose so it can't collide with your refactor. If you later want deleteFiles gone from the wire entirely, that's a coordination point with this change. User verified the UI live (checkbox gone, uninstall works).
